query: I was thinking of getting some work done in the office how is the air quality in there right now

steps.thought: The user asks about air quality in the office. First, I need to find the office room. Let me check the available rooms.
The office exists. Let me get the environmental states of the office, which include air quality (PM10).
The air quality in the office is measured by PM10, which is 55.89 µg/m³. According to common air quality standards, this is considered moderate (51-100).

action_input.answer: The air quality in the office right now is moderate, with a PM10 level of approximately 55.9 µg/m³.
